response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in geospatial routing pipelines, which are core requirements; their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in web, mobile, and non-routing geospatial contexts, with no evidence of distributed systems, routing tile optimization, or real-time traffic integration as specified.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Proven track record in open-source geospatial platforms (GISCollective, Open Green Map)
Strong advocacy for testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices
concerns: No demonstrated production experience with C++ or Rust for routing/data pipelines
Lacks explicit experience with distributed systems, fault tolerance, or navigation data optimization
Geospatial work is primarily web-based GIS, not routing tile generation or low-latency map processing
